description: Ingredients Camellia Oil Directions 1. Clean and dry the skin, 2. Apply the cream evenly in the direction of hair growth, 3. Wait for the recommended time, 4. Remove the cream with a warm washcloth, and 5. Moisturize the area Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes and broken skin. Do not leave on longer than directed. Always perform a patch test before use. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place. Do not use on recently waxed, sunburned, or irritated skin.
